name: positive-trigger-create-new
query: I keep manually drafting changelog entries from git log every release — can you turn that into a skill?
expected_behavior: Confirms the workflow passes the skill decision filter (repeated, multi-step, decision points)
Picks a lowercase kebab-case name and explains the choice
Copies assets/skill-template.md as the starting scaffold
Authors ≥3 evals in evals/ before declaring done (positive, negative, edge)
Runs scripts/validate-skill.sh AND ~/.claude/skills/skill-improver/scripts/review-skill-structure.sh as the hard gate (step 17)
Final deliverable lists evals/01-*.json, evals/02-*.json, evals/03-*.json in the file list
Does NOT mark the skill 'built' if any structure-script MISSING remains — downgrades to 'Draft' per exit criterion
